name: 5012 | A Date With Death
description:
5012 training a younger reaper who needs a little extra help. Don’t give him a stroke and dont get terminated, please.

‼️Spoilers for Beyond the Bet DLC‼️

Okay, not really spoilers cause this bot doesn’t mention Casper at all but 5012 only shows up in Beyond the Bet so a little spoilers.

Yeah…uh…idk. Don’t ask where this came from cause I do not know. I got an idea and I had to see it through. His face was too pretty to ignore, ig.

Obviously, I had to take some creative liberties with the personality since we’ve only got crumbs to work with here. If we ever get more information about him, I’ll update this to make it more canon accurate.

For now, I offer my poorly thought out version of the guy who trained Casper and totally almost terminated our babygirl (we don’t talk about ending 7 🥲).
